Valiant Garage Door

5.0•Garage door supplier

Open

Give feedback

Yes. Based on information on Valiant Garage Door's website, they install garage door openers and specifically offer **LiftMaster opener options** , including upgraded models and related installation services. Many current LiftMaster models are Wi-Fi enabled and support smartphone control through the myQ app. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Openers - Danley's Garages](https://www.danleys.com/garage-door-openers/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

The business listing for Valiant Garage Door also identifies them as a garage door supplier and installer in the Pleasanton, California area. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you're considering a smart opener, it's worth asking whether they recommend:

  * A new Wi-Fi-enabled LiftMaster opener with built-in connectivity.

  * A wall-mount (jackshaft) opener if ceiling space is limited.

  * Battery backup (required in some jurisdictions).

  * Integration with smart-home platforms, since some newer myQ-enabled openers have limited third-party smart-home compatibility. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

You can learn more or contact them through their website: [Valiant Garage Door](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com).
